mapper.sql: article_id, article_label_id, article_author, article_title, article_summary, article_type_id, article_content, article_content_html, article_image, user_id, article_good_num, article_view_num, article_community_id, create_time, recommend, enable, is_delete
mapper.select:
select substr(s.org_no,1,${orgLength}) orgNo, s.org_name orgName, count(1) articleNumber from bbs_article t join bbs_user u on t.user_id = u.id join bbs_sa_org s on u.org_no = s.org_no where t.is_delete = 0 and t.`enable` = 1
and s.org_no like concat(#{orgNo},'%')
and t.create_time >= str_to_date(#{startTime},'%Y-%m-%d')
AND T.create_time < DATE_ADD(str_to_date(#{endTime},'%Y-%m-%d'),INTERVAL 1 DAY)
group by substr(s.org_no,1,${orgLength}),s.org_name

SELECT t.*, -- 相同值序号不变，不同则+1 @rank := IF(@prev_score = t.points, @rank, @rank + 1) AS rankNum, @prev_score := t.points -- 更新前一个分数为当前分数 FROM ( select * from ( select t1.org_no orgNo,t1.org_name,ifnull(t2.posts,0) posts, ifnull(t3.replies,0) replies, (ifnull(t2.posts,0)*#{post}+ifnull(t3.replies,0)*#{reply}) points from ( select s.org_no,s.org_name from bbs_sa_org s where s.is_delete = 0 and s.org_no like concat(#{orgNo},'%') and length(s.org_no) <= ${orgLength}) t1 left join ( select substr(u.org_no,1,${orgLength}) org_no, count(1) posts from bbs_article t join bbs_user u on t.user_id = u.id where t.is_delete = 0 and t.`enable` = 1 and u.org_no like concat(#{orgNo},'%') and t.create_time >= str_to_date(#{startTime},'%Y-%m-%d') AND t.create_time < DATE_ADD(str_to_date(#{endTime},'%Y-%m-%d'),INTERVAL 1 DAY) group by substr(u.org_no,1,${orgLength})) t2 on t1.org_no = t2.org_no left join ( select substr(u.org_no,1,${orgLength}) org_no, count(1) replies from bbs_comment t join bbs_user u on t.comment_user_id = u.id where t.is_delete = 0 and t.`enable` = 1 and u.org_no like concat(#{orgNo},'%') and t.comment_time >= str_to_date(#{startTime},'%Y-%m-%d') AND t.comment_time < DATE_ADD(str_to_date(#{endTime},'%Y-%m-%d'),INTERVAL 1 DAY) group by substr(u.org_no,1,${orgLength})) t3 on t1.org_no = t3.org_no ) p order by p.points desc,p.orgNo ) t, -- 初始化变量：@rank 初始为0，@prev_score 初始为一个不存在的值（避免首行判断错误） (SELECT @rank := 0, @prev_score := NULL) AS init_var
